plannedVsActual.planned_phase1: High risk (R2 score 16), expect robust smoke coverage and no 5xx
plannedVsActual.actual_phase2_midterm: Coverage 87.5 percent but /news failed with HTTP 500
plannedVsActual.gap: Runtime reliability gap despite broad coverage
plannedVsActual.interpretation: Coverage breadth did not guarantee production stability
plannedVsActual.next_action: Add route-level diagnostics and enforce 0 public 5xx in CI

plannedVsActual.planned_phase1: R4/R6 medium risk with middleware-based protection
plannedVsActual.actual_phase2_midterm: Two integration smoke failures with 404 outcomes; new midterm integration tests pass for boundary validation
plannedVsActual.gap: Contract-path instability persists beyond boundary middleware
plannedVsActual.interpretation: Core boundary checks are strong, downstream route/data paths remain fragile
plannedVsActual.next_action: Stabilize integration endpoint routing/data shape and add CI contract checks

plannedVsActual.planned_phase1: Critical operations with strong guard expectations
plannedVsActual.actual_phase2_midterm: One circulation/admin guard mismatch and low admin/circulation coverage (50-66.7%)
plannedVsActual.gap: Detectability and depth insufficient for high-impact workflows
plannedVsActual.interpretation: High-impact modules need deeper scenario coverage
plannedVsActual.next_action: Increase admin/circulation automated checks beyond 70 percent

plannedVsActual.planned_phase1: R13 score 16 with coverage reporting expected
plannedVsActual.actual_phase2_midterm: Local coverage driver blocked; CI coverage exists but local reproducibility reduced
plannedVsActual.interpretation: Tooling gap impacts confidence and defect detectability
plannedVsActual.next_action: Standardize coverage tooling across local and CI

plannedVsActual.actual_phase2_midterm: Midterm added 8 tests across Unit/Integration/E2E with evidence logs
plannedVsActual.interpretation: Progress achieved, but repeated-run stability dataset is still limited
plannedVsActual.next_action: Introduce scheduled reruns and flaky-rate tracking
